lede: A look at June 30 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Friedrich Theodor Vischer and Walter Ulbricht, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Tajikistan
events.desc: A Tajik citizen with ISIS connections, wanted in Tajikistan for murder and kidnapping, kills two people at Chișinău International Airport in Moldova, after being denied entry to the country.

events.title: Yemenia Flight 626
events.desc: Yemenia Flight 626, an Airbus A310-300, crashes into the Indian Ocean near Comoros, killing 152 of the 153 people on board. A 14-year-old girl named Bahia Bakari survives the crash.

events.title: Airbus A330
events.desc: An Airbus A330-300 crashes during a test flight at Toulouse–Blagnac Airport, killing all seven people on board.

events.title: National Organization for Women
events.desc: The National Organization for Women, the United States' largest feminist organization, is founded.

events.title: Belgian Congo
events.desc: Belgian Congo gains independence as Republic of the Congo (Léopoldville).

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Battle of Cherbourg ends with the fall of the strategically valuable port to American forces.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: In "the day Sussex died", elements of the Royal Sussex Regiment take heavy casualties in the Battle of the Boar's Head at Richebourg-l'Avoué in France.

events.title: Albert Einstein
events.desc: Albert Einstein sends the article On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies, in which he introduces special relativity, for publication in Annalen der Physik.

events.title: Montreal
events.desc: The first transcontinental train trip across Canada departs from Montreal, Quebec. It arrives in Port Moody, British Columbia on July 4.

events.title: Ming dynasty
events.desc: Zhu Yunwen ascended the throne to the Ming dynasty to become the Jianwen Emperor.

births.name: Walter Ulbricht
births.line: German soldier and politician, chief decision maker and head of state of the GDR (East Germany)

births.name: Czesław Miłosz
births.line: Polish novelist, essayist, and poet, Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Kurt von Schleicher, German general and politician, 23rd Chancellor of Germany
Dadabhai Naoroji, Parsi intellectual, educator, cotton trader, and an early Indian political and social leader

observances.text: Christian feast day: St. Paul the Apostle (solo feast day)
Christian feast day: St. Mary of Jerusalem, mother of Apostle Mark the Evangelist first Bishop of Alexandria and Byblos
Christian feast day: Feast of the 12 Apostles is on June 30 (marks the end of the Season of Pentecost and the beginning of the Season of Apostles)
Christian feast day: First Martyrs of the Church of Rome
Christian feast day: St. Theobald of Provins
Christian feast day: St. Adolf of Osnabrück
Christian feast day: St. Otto of Bamberg
